question: राज्य ID 1 असलेल्या प्रत्येक जलस्रोत प्रकारासाठी प्रथम मलद स्ट्रेप्टोकोकी MPN प्रति 100ml च्या कमाल मूल्यांची गणना करा, त्या कमाल मूल्यांची सरासरी मोजा, परंतु अशा अटीसह की त्या जलस्रोत प्रकारासाठी कमाल मूल्य 0 पेक्षा जास्त असावे.
gold_sql: SELECT AVG(T3.col_0) FROM (SELECT MAX(T2.MAX_FECAL_STREPTOCOCCI_MPN_PER_100ML) AS col_0 FROM DIM_STATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_STREPTOCOCCI AS T2 ON T1.STATION_ID = T2.STATION_ID WHERE T1.STATE_ID = 1 GROUP BY T1.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY HAVING MAX(T2.MAX_FECAL_STREPTOCOCCI_MPN_PER_100ML) > 0) AS T3
predicted_sql:
SELECT AVG(max_strep) AS avg_of_max_streptococci
FROM (
    SELECT ds.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY, MAX(fs.MAX_FECAL_STREPTOCOCCI_MPN_PER_100ML) AS max_strep
    FROM DIM_STATION ds
    JOIN FACT_STREPTOCOCCI fs ON ds.STATION_ID = fs.STATION_ID
    WHERE ds.STATE_ID = 1
    GROUP BY ds.TYPE_OF_WATER_BODY
    HAVING MAX(fs.MAX_FECAL_STREPTOCOCCI_MPN_PER_100ML) > 0
) subquery;
